notes: Upon launch the game gets to a trademark screen but then remains black for a long period of time. I disabled esync, forced large address aware, and even used wine D3d11 with no success.
title: River City Girls

notes: River City Girls does launch, but only displays a copyright screen, then gets stuck on a black screen. User is forced to end the process manually to exit. I attempted to run it through all of the available Proton versions at this time of writing, in addition to several of the tweaks (such as Esync, etc.) Nothing appears to get it beyond this stage.
title: River City Girls

notes: Seems to work fine with the "https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install" workaround installed. Even with fix installed there may be a chance of the video not loading and are given a black screen but you can then just skip the scene.
title: River City Girls

notes: it works only with the utility "https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install" it is a bit difficult to install but the result is perfect, the performance is correct, and it works well with the control of xbox one, the game saves correctly and the cinematics look great except the first time, restart the game and look correctly
title: River City Girls

notes:
I am updating my initial report of Borked to confirm that the fix described by the others below resolved my problem. Using the Media Foundation fix here: https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install and setting the Wine prefix as described resolved my issue. Can also confirm that if you have Windows installed on another machine you can copy the same DLLs from there for use with the script if you don't want to trust random DLLs from the internet.

The only minor niggle is that it defaults to the keyboard being the first player, so it kept registering the second player as the controller until I unplugged the keyboard and started it up without it. Otherwise, seems to run perfectly.
title: River City Girls

notes:
As others have noted, you have to apply the fix found at: https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install

Once I did this, everything runs just fine with an Xbox 360 controller.
title: River City Girls
